title: TARI EASON — THE DATA BRANCH
subtitle: 2022 class · #12 · LSU
rareLabel: RARE AIR — high steals AND high blocks

fingerprint.title: THE DEFENDER FINGERPRINT
fingerprint.text: Do-everything forwards who steal AND block at a rare rate — all carrying Eason's question: can the offence catch up? Dots are draft-year college numbers. Hit Per 40 to see who really dominates per minute.

subject.name: Tari Eason
subject.per40: The catch: just 24.4 min/g off the bench (SEC 6th Man of the Year). Hit Per 40 and watch him leap into the rare-air corner — 3.1 steals + 1.8 blocks, right up with Covington.
subject.note: "Freak defender — the question is whether he can be good enough on offence."

comps.name: Robert Covington
comps.became: Led the NBA in steals (2018) & made All-Defensive First Team. The prototype 3&D wing — exactly the shooting leap Eason needs.

rel.text: dual steal + block freak, became All-Defense 3&D

comps.name: Jae Crowder
comps.became: Big East POY → 12-year NBA starter, 3&D forward, started in two Finals (2020, 2021). The dependable floor.

comps.name: Draymond Green
comps.became: Consensus National POY → 4× champion, DPOY, 4× All-Star. Fewer college steals, but the do-everything brain. The dream ceiling.
